items.title: Chase Ultimate Rewards offering 55% transfer bonus to Marriott
items.summary: On May 1, Chase launched a 65% transfer bonus to Marriott Bonvoy, meaning you’d get 1.65 Bonvoy points for every Ultimate Reward point that you transfer until May 15th. That was an early bird bonus as the transfer bonus is continuing through June 30, 2026, but at a slightly lower 55% rate. Com
